ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ByteByteGoHq/system-design-101
Language: unknown
Explain complex systems using visuals and simple terms. Help you prepare for system design interviews.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Hamed233/Cybersecurity-Mastery-Roadmap
Language: unknown
A comprehensive, step-by-step guide to mastering cybersecurity from beginner to expert level with curated resources, tools, and career guidance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
Language: unknown
A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: caramaschiHG/awesome-ai-agents-2026
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/caramaschiHG/awesome-ai-agents-2026
Language: unknown
🤖 The most comprehensive list of AI agents, frameworks & tools in 2026. 300+ resources · 20+ categories · Updated monthly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
Language: unknown
This repository contains a 90-day cybersecurity study plan, along with resources and materials for learning various cybersecurity concepts and technologies. The plan is organized into daily tasks, covering topics such as Network+, Security+, Linux, Python, Traffic Analysis, Git, ELK, AWS, Azure, and Hacking. The repository also includes a `LEARN.md

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kepano/obsidian-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-skills
Language: unknown
Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Obsidian CLI and open formats including Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas.
